caption: A man with a bald head and olive skin, wearing a black blazer over a white collared shirt, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in a professional indoor setting with other people visible in the blurred background, including a man in a green shirt and people standing in a hallway. A small microphone is attached to his cheek. Across the bottom of the scene, a blue and white banner persists throughout the clip. The top two frames feature the text "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY", and "Sponsored By MongoDB". In the final two frames, the banner text updates to include "SANJEEV MOHAN", "Principal, SanMo | @SanjMo", and the same sponsorship and location information. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his facial expression and hand positions slightly.
